identity.name: GAAIUS AI
identity.core_philosophy: Unified Intelligence. One Interface, Infinite Capability.

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: relative overflow-hidden after:content-[''] after:absolute after:inset-0 after:border-2 after:border-transparent after:animate-border-trace

layout_strategy.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 border-r border-white/10 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl z-50 hidden md:block

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white font-secondary tracking-wide shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-secondary hover:bg-secondary/80 text-white font-secondary border border-white/5

cards.default: rounded-2xl bg-card border border-white/10 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.chat: rounded-2xl bg-secondary/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 text-lg py-6 px-6 shadow-inner

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.stagger_children: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

hero_background.description: Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape - Use as subtle background overlay with low opacity

empty_state_art.description: Abstract streaks of purple and pink lights - Use for 'No chats yet' or welcome screen hero

cyber_city.description: Guangzhou night skyline - Use for 'Video Generation' feature preview card

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Electric Void' color palette and font families.
3. GLOBAL STYLES: Apply the 'grain_overlay' class to the body in index.css to give the entire app a cinematic texture.
4. LAYOUT: Build the 'MainLayout' component first, implementing the glassmorphic sidebar and the chat area container.
5. CHAT INTERFACE: The chat input should be floating at the bottom, detached from the edge, with a 'glass' effect.
6. MODEL SELECTOR: Create a prominent 'Model Mode' switcher (Chat / Image / Video) that changes the accent color based on the active mode (Purple for Chat, Cyan for Image, Orange for Video).
7. USE SONNER: Replace any default alerts with 'sonner' toasts for a premium feel.
8. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'chat-input', 'send-button', 'model-selector').
universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients for backgrounds; use solid deep colors or subtle noise textures.
Never use 'Inter' font. Use 'Manrope' for UI and 'Unbounded' for headings.
All containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (gap-8, py-12).
Dark mode is the ONLY mode. Do not implement light mode toggles.
